title: syntherisma stricta
intro: Syntherisma stricta, also known as the stiff or upright syntherisma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Syntherisma stricta include reducing pain and inflammation, treating fever, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for consumption, and can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or salve.
